content:
Hi!

I noticed that the mailing list link in the contact page sends an email to majordomo, which is deprecated. This results in the email being rejected with this message:

Your message to <majordomo@vger.kernel.org> was not processed, because Majordomo is no longer used at vger.kernel.org after migration to the new
platform.
To subscribe or unsubscribe to lists, please visit https://subspace.kernel.org/vger.kernel.org.html and use the "sub/unsub" links next to the list you want.

I created a PR in the website's repo to fix the link, but please let me know if that's not the right procedure to follow for this repo :)
